title: Sequential Data
summary: Data that has a temporal or sequential structure, such as time series data or natural language text. It sits inside Data Representation / Data Types. Compare it with Numeric Data and Categorical Data.

blocks.title: Compare and Contrast

panels.label: What it is

panels.label: What it is not

panels.label: Common confusion
